name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.9.0 -> 1.10.0): Housekeeping Phase 2 — stripped historical-burden framing (specs/->docs/ migration issue refs and coexistence-window language) from spec.md Inv 6 and both SKILL.md layout sections, and opted into the Inv 49 strict tier via housekeeping_clean=true. The live dual-read behaviour (docs/ preferred, specs/ then legacy docs/spec/ fallback) is preserved verbatim; only the historical wrapper was removed.
